src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Migrate Java EE annotations from javax.* to jakarta.* namespace to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by modern runtimes.
Migrate JAX-RS and CDI annotations from javax to jakarta namespace to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by modern application servers.
src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.human_impl: Changed imports from javax.enterprise.context.ApplicationScoped, javax.ws.rs.ApplicationPath, and javax.ws.rs.core.Application to their jakarta equivalents.

src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Replace javax.enterprise and javax.transaction imports with their jakarta equivalents to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements.
Removed the code field from the Message entity as it is no longer needed.
Simplified the Message constructor to only accept an ID, removing code and text parameters.
Updated equals and hashCode methods to only consider the ID field, removing dependencies on code and text.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Upgrade Quarkus from version 2.14.0 to 3.5.0, which requires Java 17+ and introduces breaking API changes.
Upgrade SLF4J to version 2.0.6 to match Quarkus 3.x requirements and modern logging standards.
Replace the old common REST dependency with new modular cloudtrain dependencies for REST, Persistence, and Observability.
Replace the old common test dependency with the new core test dependency.
Upgrade Maven compiler plugin to 3.11.0 to support Java 21 compilation.
Replace Quarkus RESTEasy with Quarkus RESTEasy Reactive Jackson for improved performance and modern JSON handling.
Replace cnj-common-test with cnj-common-test-core in test dependencies.

buildspec.yml.general_idea: Explicitly install and configure JDK 21 in the build environment to replace the implicit or older JDK version.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the Docker base image from Eclipse Temurin 17 to a custom CloudTrain JRE 21 image to target Java 21.
